segments.text: That was tough - had to keep tracking that outer DI
segments.original_text: また難しかったですね 外側ベク変を追い切らなければいけなかったので

segments.text: It came down to the wire
segments.original_text: ギリギリとなりました

segments.text: There looked like a platform timing window, but...
segments.original_text: さあブロックで時間差かなとこでしたが

segments.text: He sneaks under the ledge and lands the up B!
segments.original_text: 崖の内側に潜り込んで上Bを刺したのを通す
前投げ もちろん上シフトで

segments.text: Oh no! If that connects, that's brutal!
segments.original_text: まずい!刺さるとキツイっすね!

full_text: That was tough - had to keep tracking that outer DI It came down to the wire There looked like a platform timing window, but... He sneaks under the ledge and lands the up B! Forward throw - DI up, naturally Oh no! If that connects, that's brutal! And it stuck!

corrections.original: 崖の内側に潜り込んで上に刺さったのを通す
corrections.corrected: 崖の内側に潜り込んで上Bを刺したのを通す
corrections.rule: 上に刺さった→上Bを刺した
上側変更→上シフト (directional influence)

corrections.corrected: 刺さるとキツイっすね!
corrections.rule: misheard: きくせえ→キツイっすね
